basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Sports Coaches Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Dharwad. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules and regulations of IIT Dharwad.

qualification.education_qualification: NIS Diploma / Bachelor's degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) / Master's degree (M.P.Ed) / MS
qualification.details: Sports Coaches: NIS Diploma / Bachelor's degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) / Master's degree (M.P.Ed) / MS in Sports from a recognized university. Relevant coaching experience at University/State/National level. Participation at State/University level is mandatory. Proven track record of producing medal winners is preferred.

salary_details.details: Senior Coach: Rs. 45,000/- to 50,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 513/- per hour (part-time) Coach: Rs. 40,000/- to 45,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 449/- per hour (part-time) Junior Coach: Rs. 35,000/- to 40,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 385/- per hour (part-time)

selection_process: Skill Test Interview Any other mode as decided by the Institute
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches recruitment is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sports Coaches at IIT Dharwad?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the post of Sports Coaches at IIT Dharwad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Sports Coaches post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification includes a NIS Diploma or a Bachelor's degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) or a Master's degree (M.P.Ed) or MS in Sports from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Sports Coaches position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Sports Coaches position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Sports Coaches recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Skill Test, Interview, and any other mode as decided by the Institute.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary range for a Junior Coach?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Coach ranges from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 385/- per hour (part-time).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Sports Coaches post?
faq.answer: Yes, relevant coaching experience at University/State/National level is required. Participation at State/University level is mandatory.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IIT Dharwad website or the direct link provided in the Important Links section on or before the last date.
